context: Evaluates the agent's ability to perform a full plan review: read the plan, ask about models, spawn 3 reviewers in parallel, and produce a consolidated report.

checklist.name: Read plan and compose brief
checklist.description: Agent reads the plan file and composes a self-contained brief

checklist.name: Model selection check
checklist.description: Agent checks opencode.json first, then asks user for model preferences

checklist.name: Parallel spawn
checklist.description: All 3 reviewers are spawned in parallel (single message, 3 task calls)

checklist.name: Collated report
checklist.description: Report includes all 8 required sections with per-reviewer attribution

checklist.name: Follow-up offered
checklist.description: Agent offers to investigate flagged items after presenting the report

checklist.name: Not sequential
checklist.description: Agent does NOT spawn reviewers one at a time
